description_long: This is a rectangular wooden storage box with a robust, rustic appearance, featuring dark wood planks arranged horizontally and vertically on its surfaces. The box is reinforced with a black metallic frame along its edges, giving it added durability and a slightly industrial look. The front side is equipped with a prominent metal latch, suggesting it can be securely closed and possibly locked. The wood grain is visible and natural, with some texture variation, and the box appears to be solidly constructed. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, and the top surface is flat, making it suitable for stacking or placing other items on top. The overall design suggests it is intended for use in garages, storage rooms, or outdoor urban environments where secure storage is needed.
description: A sturdy, rectangular wooden storage box with a black metal frame and a front metal latch. The box has a rustic, industrial look and a flat, stackable top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wood grain, black metal frame, and a central metal latch for securing the lid.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the continuous wood paneling and metal frame, with no visible latch or handles.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the uninterrupted wood and metal construction, lacking any locking mechanism or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood and metal frame without any interactive features.
